name: AI Media Generator
description_en: Write high-quality prompts for AI image, video, and music platforms—picking the right model for the task—and optionally drive the target site via browser automation to submit them.
description_zh: 为 AI 生图、生视频、生音乐平台撰写高质量提示词(并按任务选对模型),需要时还能通过浏览器自动化把提示词送到目标平台。
long_en: Platform-agnostic across Kling, Suno, Midjourney, Runway, Veo, Seedance, Flux and more, with guidance on character consistency, multi-shot storyboards, and fixing flawed results.
long_zh: 跨 Kling、Suno、Midjourney、Runway、Veo、Seedance、Flux 等平台通用,涵盖角色一致性、多镜头分镜与瑕疵修复的指引。
sec_note_en: Can drive your browser to submit content to third-party platforms; review actions and use accounts you control.
sec_note_zh: 可驱动浏览器向第三方平台提交内容;请审阅操作并使用你自己掌控的账号。
